title: phanera ridleyi
intro: Phanera ridleyi is a species of climbing plant in the family Moraceae, commonly known as a tropical vine. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phanera ridleyi include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Phanera ridleyi is often used to make decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
